description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS GitHub Actions that triggers on push to all branches except those matching **-1.3 or **-1.5, tags except v1.*, and paths except docs/**, Changelog.md, and README.md. Also trigger on pull requests and published releases. The workflow should have a build job running on ubuntu-18.04 and macos-latest, and two integration test jobs running on macos-latest and ubuntu-16.04. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures, compiles, and runs tests.
